creator: dewayne@heuristicsystems.com.au
text:
freeradius3 fails to compile with these options enabled:
     HEIMDAL=on: With Heimdal Kerberos support
     HEIMDAL_PORT=on: With Heimdal Kerberos from ports
     KERBEROS=on: Kerberos support

This issue was logged with the freeradius3 github and closed, details refer:
https://github.com/FreeRADIUS/freeradius-server/issues/586

(This might save some people's time if they experience a problem with the freeradius3 build.)

Fix: 

Update port to 3.0.3 when available.
